title: carex capillaris subsp. robustior
intro: Carex capillaris subsp. robustior, also known as robust lesser wood sedge, is a subspecies of sedge, a type of grass-like perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to be due to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal medicine, Carex capillaris subsp. robustior is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in infusions and salves to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
